title: Make potassium orthophosphate solution
author: Gurdon Institute media kitchen
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.5yeg7te

steps.title: %s %s Solution Potassium Orthophosphates Strength 0
steps.instruction: %s %s Solution Potassium Orthophosphates Strength 0.17M & 0.72 pH: Batch size 1.2L Date of preparation Ingredients Quantity Added (tick) Manufacturer /Batch No. KH2PO4 ( potassium dihydrogen orthophosphate) 27.7g K2HPO4 (dipotassium hydrogen orthophosphate) 150.5g Double distilled H2O up to 1.2L

steps.title: %s %s Solution Potassium Orthophosphates Strength 0
steps.instruction: %s %s Solution Potassium Orthophosphates Strength 0.17M & 0.72 pH: Batch size 1.2L Ingredients Quantity KH2PO4 (potassium dihydrogen orthophosphate) 27.7g K2HPO4 (dipotassium hydrogen orthophosphate) 150.5g Double distilled H2O up to 1.2L Method 1 Using a 2L measuring cylinder add 500ml of double distilled H2O. 2 Dissolve solutes and make up to final volume with double distilled H2O 3 Dispense into 12 x 100ml bottles. 4 Label, date and autoclave.
